title: ECB to hike rates as Mideast war pushes up inflation
summary: The European Central Bank is poised to raise interest rates for the first time in two and a half years, driven by escalating inflation fueled by the Iran war's energy shock. title: Kospi crashes 9%, trading halted for 20 minutes, as chip rout deepens; Samsung, SK Hynix worst hit

The KOSPI experienced its second trading halt this year.
